title: UX polish: tomoshibi uppercase prefix, progress IPC personality, ensure-ready banner
description: Three UX issues: (1) gh#51 tomoshibi emits /CAR: instead of /car: causing unknown command errors; (2) gh#52 progress IPC monitor events are bare pipe-delimited log lines lacking persona/emoji/context; (3) gh#54 ensure-ready.cjs multi-line banner collapses to single visible line in Claude Code inline display.
